title: Session 17 — Back to Koviz
bodyText:
# What happened
Two teams: **team sneaky** (find G) and **team loud** (find Filbert). En route, a goblin trap was spotted and dispatched — one escaped, one captured, and **Cumb "spared her from torture" by killing her himself**. In Koviz: the **F & B company's expansion** everywhere (posters of Brolin and Filbert, "Gond's Gift to Koviz"), awkward Filbert conversations, G found and briefed. Planning at Gond's Craft (Gabriel vetoed hideout status) moved to **Varen's apartment** for the night.
